title: varronia dichotoma
intro: Varronia dichotoma, also known as the prickly bush or elephant's tooth, is a shrub or small tree native to tropical and subtropical regions of the Americas, Africa, and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Varronia dichotoma include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections, as well as being used to manage diabetes and hypertension. Varronia dichotoma can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and creams for topical application.
